channel.title: William von Mueffling — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by William von Mueffling (Cantillon Capital Management) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: William von Mueffling: ADDED MCO (+10%) · Q4 2025
item.description: William von Mueffling (Cantillon Capital Management) added MCO in Q4 2025 · 6.4% of portfolio. Adding to Moody's.

item.title: William von Mueffling: ADDED ICE (+15%) · Q4 2025
item.description: William von Mueffling (Cantillon Capital Management) added ICE in Q4 2025 · 5.8% of portfolio. Building ICE.

item.title: William von Mueffling: TRIMMED MSFT (-6%) · Q4 2025
item.description: William von Mueffling (Cantillon Capital Management) trimmed MSFT in Q4 2025 · 7.8% of portfolio. Small Microsoft trim.

item.title: William von Mueffling: ADDED MSFT (+8%) · Q3 2025
item.description: William von Mueffling (Cantillon Capital Management) added MSFT in Q3 2025 · 8.3% of portfolio. Microsoft add before Q4 trim.

item.title: William von Mueffling: ADDED SPGI (+10%) · Q3 2025
item.description: William von Mueffling (Cantillon Capital Management) added SPGI in Q3 2025 · 5.5% of portfolio. S&P Global add.
